creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Sep 27, 2006 at 07:30:27AM +0000, Imri Zvik wrote:
I>  I doubt this is an issue of unlogged events now being logged, as I also
I>  see stalls in traffic when those timeouts occur, a thing I did not have
I>  before.

What if you try debug.mpsafenet=0?

Totus tuus, Glebius.
